home.hero.title: Build a faster web, without the fight.
home.hero.subtitle: A performance-first stack for teams that ship.
home.features.title: What you get
home.features.edge.title: Edge-first rendering
home.features.edge.desc: SSG for marketing, streamed SSR for dashboard. Every route gets the right strategy.
home.features.auth.title: Auth built-in
home.features.auth.desc: HMAC-signed sessions, role-based access, and server-validated forms out of the box.
home.features.i18n.title: Internationalised
home.features.i18n.desc: EN and DE with locale-aware URLs, hreflang, and Intl formatters throughout.
home.features.table.title: Data table
home.features.table.desc: Paginated, sorted, filtered table of 220 rows with optimistic inline editing.
home.features.a11y.title: Accessible by default
home.features.a11y.desc: Semantic HTML, keyboard navigation, WCAG AA contrast, axe-clean E2E tests.
home.features.perf.title: Performance budgeted
home.features.perf.desc: LCP < 2s, CLS < 0.1, INP < 200ms — enforced in CI, not just measured.
home.pricing.title: Pricing
home.pricing.starter.name: Starter
home.pricing.pro.name: Pro
home.pricing.ent.name: Enterprise
home.social.heading: Customer testimonials
home.social.t1.quote: We rebuilt our marketing site on this stack and cut LCP from 3.4s to 0.8s. The team stopped fighting the framework.
home.social.t2.quote: Tokens, runes, and streamed loads — these aren't novelty, they're how I want every project to feel.
home.social.t3.quote: Our team's pull request reviews got noticeably shorter. The code reads itself.
